sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 92:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 92:1
items.html: All the Partzufim and the souls that are emanated and come in the worlds are parts of the surrounding light. When all of them are revealed, it will be the end of correction. (Inner Observation, Item 1)
